jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at 99acres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? 99acres in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
